revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: #FFB; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="partial table-partial" {{#if:{{{rowspan|}}}|rowspan="{{{rowspan}}}"}} |{{{text|[[File:Brown_check.svg|13px|link={{{link|}}}|{{{1|Maybe}}}]] {{{2|}}}}}}<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}</noinclude>

<noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: #FFB; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="partial table-partial" {{#if:{{{rowspan|}}}|rowspan="{{{rowspan}}}"}} |{{{text|[[File:Brown_check.svg|13px|link={{{link|}}}|{{{1|Maybe}}}]] {{{2|}}}}}}<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically made stuff
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: #FFB; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="partial table-partial" {{#if:{{{rowspan|}}}|rowspan="{{{rowspan}}}"}} |{{{text|[[File:Brown_check.svg|13px|link={{{link|}}}|{{{1|Maybe}}}]] {{{2|}}}}}}<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}</noinclude>

revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: #FFB; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="partial table-partial" {{#if:{{{rowspan|}}}|rowspan="{{{rowspan}}}"}} |{{{text|[[File:Brown_check.svg|13px|link={{{link|}}}|{{{1|Maybe}}}]] {{{2|}}}}}}<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: #FFB; color:black; vertical-align: middle; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="partial table-partial" {{#if:{{{rowspan|}}}|rowspan="{{{rowspan}}}"}} |{{{text|[[File:Brown_check.svg|13px|link={{{link|}}}|{{{1|Maybe}}}]] {{{2|}}}}}}<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
